transcript: Speaker A: ಒಂದು ದಿನ ನಾನು ಮತ್ತೆ ನನ್ನ ಫ್ರೆಂಡ್ ನೇಹಾ ಮಾಲ್ ಗೆ ಹೋಗಿದ್ವಿ... [One day, my friend Neha and I went to a mall. I froze when the cashier asked me a simple question in English. Neha answered confidently and told me she uses the SpeakX app to practice. It has an AI teacher and costs just ₹29 for 7 days. I downloaded it, practiced daily, and now speak English confidently. Download SpeakX today!]
on_screen_text:
DRESS ISHTA AYTU [Liked the dress]
ADANNA KHARIDI MADIDE [Bought it]
CARRY BAG BEKA ATHAVA PAPER BAG BEKA [Carry bag or paper bag?]
AVLU CARRY BAG TOGOLLTHALE ANTA [She will take a carry bag]
ENGLISH MAATADTA IDLU [She was speaking English]
SIMPLE NAANU SPEAKX APP USE MAADTINI [Simple, I use SpeakX app]
JUST ₹29 GE 7 DAYS START MADABAHUDU [Start 7 days for just ₹29]
DAILY PRACTICE STARTMADIDE [Started daily practice]
SITUATION FACE MADIDIRA [Faced this situation?]
SpeakX
summary: The presenter shares a story of freezing when asked a simple English question at a mall, while her friend answered confidently using the SpeakX app. She highlights the app's AI teacher, daily practice benefits, and an affordable ₹29 offer for 7 days, encouraging viewers to download it.
